hero.titleBefore: Discover, Compare, and Buy from Local Markets —
hero.subtitle: EthioLocal connects buyers with nearby sellers, shows the best prices, and ensures secure transactions with QR verification.

features.title: Built for smarter local buying
features.subtitle: Price clarity, proximity, trust, and AI help — in one premium experience.

items.title: Smart price comparison
items.description: See offers side by side and pick the best value without hopping between chats and shops.

items.title: Nearby shops (GPS)
items.description: Discover sellers around you with hyperlocal listings that respect where you actually are.

items.title: QR verification
items.description: Confirm pickup and release funds only when the buyer scans the right token at handoff.

items.title: AI assistant
items.description: Natural-language help for finding products, comparing options, and tracking your orders.

howItWorks.title: From discovery to verified pickup
howItWorks.subtitle: A linear flow that keeps buyers informed and sellers protected.

steps.title: Browse products
steps.description: Search categories and nearby listings tailored to your location.

steps.title: Compare prices
steps.description: Stack offers from multiple sellers before you commit.

steps.title: Pay securely
steps.description: Complete checkout with transparent totals and payment tracking.

steps.title: Verify with QR
steps.description: Scan at pickup so both sides know the handoff is legitimate.

preview.title: Web command center, mobile momentum
preview.subtitle: Operators see the full picture on the dashboard; buyers stay in flow with the mobile app experience.

trust.title: Why choose EthioLocal?
trust.subtitle: We combine marketplace mechanics with verification and analytics so communities can trade with confidence—not just convenience.
bullets: Verified transactions with structured order and payment states
Local-first design: proximity, language, and regional payment patterns
Transparent pricing and comparison before you buy
Secure payments with clear status from pending to completed
